text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I can't believe it's already the last<n>day of
summer camp. Feels like it<n>went by in a flash.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (But... I definitely did improve.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't come crying to me if people<n>scoff at you
when you ask them to<n>train with a pipsqueak.
No one would do that.
No one would do that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, huh? I guess I should<n>give it a
shot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who's that in front of the<n>screen?

text_block_list.name: Screen
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is in the lead with fifty<n>meters left!
She's holding it... and<n>finishes first!

text_block_list.name: Screen
text_block_list.text:
That was nine lengths between first<n>and second
place! Narita Brian debuts<n>with a glorious win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Brian's debuted already?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Taishin. Yes, she'll be in her<n>junior year
starting this year.

Narita Brian is an Umamusume with<n>devastating
physical prowess—hailed<n>as "the Beast"—and is
also Biwa<n>Hayahide's younger sister.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you're not watching<n>this footage
over and over again just<n>because you're proud
of your sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... How nice it would be if our<n>relationship
were that simple.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The Beast has been loosed from her<n>cage now.
I'm sure she'll sweep<n>through all her races and
sprint<n>toward a glorious level of fame.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I dare even say that it won't be long<n>until she
sinks her teeth into me as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, I will not let her tear me<n>apart.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My winning equation will be<n>completed soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (The heck is up with that...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (It's not something you get just by<n>training!)

Summer camp comes to a conclusion,<n>and the
Kikuka Sho draws near,<n>bringing with it
premonitions of<n>trouble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I keep coughing lately...
